text.title: Content Refresh SOP — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the output shape of a refresh decision + the executed checklist. Agent must satisfy this before publishing or escalating to human review.

forbidden.pattern: evidence_replacement entries that are LLM-fabricated citations (no resolvable URL or DOI)
decision=kill with neither redirect_target nor 410_status set
refresh checklist marked complete while primary_claim unchanged AND evidence unchanged
cosmetic-only prose rewrite passed off as refresh ("re-worded for clarity" without new claim/evidence)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group multiple stale stats into one updated stat block; tag with member count.
Trim outdated examples while preserving the rule they illustrate.
Consolidate two near-duplicate URLs into one (decision=consolidate) — the surviving URL takes the better-ranking slug, the other 301s.

section.title: Self-check checklist (run before marking refresh DONE)

list.item: Two-signal decay rule satisfied (r1) OR decision=leave
SERP intent check executed within last 7 days (r2)
At least one piece of new evidence added with resolvable citation (r4)
If date bumped — at least one of {claim, intro, H1, primary data} actually changed (r3)
If kill — redirect target chosen OR 410 status set (r5)
Internal link anchors do not cannibalize sibling cluster URLs
Image alt text reflects current visual content, not stale 2023 screenshots
